_meta.description: Sword of Vermilion script entry point index

caller_types.npc_str_ptr: MOVE.l #Label, obj_npc_str_ptr(...) — NPC dialogue assignment in npc.asm
caller_types.print_macro: print Label — inline print macro call
caller_types.script_source_base: MOVE.l #Label, Script_source_base — direct VM program counter set
caller_types.pointer_table: dc.l Label — entry in a dialogue dispatch pointer table

callers.context: dc.l	SpriteGfxData_8E0C8	; Excalabria/ruin tileset (anomalous — raw sprite data ptrs)
